case_title: BURGER CRAIG C VS THE CITY TOW et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY BURGER CRAIG C AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW BYRD ROSEMARIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
INVALID SERVICE AS TO THE CITY TOW, NO MAILING DONE ON WHAT SHOULD HAVE BEEN SUBSERVICE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-29-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-10-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURGER CRAIG C RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW $232.74 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $240.74 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
